name: Crocotta
primary_sources: On the Characteristics of Animals by Aelian
On Abstinence from Animal Food by Porphyry

visual_attributes.morphology: hybrid of a dog, wolf, hyena, and lion
distinctive_features: unbroken ridge of bone in each jaw forming a continuous tooth
mouth opening right back to the ears
visual_attributes.size_and_scale: about the size of an ass
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: stag's haunches, lion's neck, tail and breast, badger's head

domain_specific_visual.ORACULAR_EYES: striped gems that provide oracular powers

functional_attributes.primary_function: deadly enemy of men and dogs
secondary_functions: calls men by name to devour them

domain_specific_functional.MIMICRY: imitates voices of men and cattle
domain_specific_functional.INVINCIBILITY: cannot be overcome by any weapon of steel

relationships.description: The crocotta is a deadly enemy of men.
The crocotta is a deadly enemy of dogs.

contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: Represents fearsome and deceptive qualities, linked to hyena folklore

contrastive_constraints: NOT a simple wolf or dog
NOT a creature without mythical hybrid features
